_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: proximity ligation assay sets (PLA) to assess the proximity of GFP+ iNPC-derived neurons (TUJ1+ cells)
details: Successfully identified neurons in cerebral organoids and was used in proximity ligation assays to assess neuron-tumor cell proximity
